name: Germany
source: Fraunhofer ISE, public net electricity generation 2023: wind 139.8, PV 59.9, lignite 77.6, hard coal 36.1, gas 45.8, biomass ~42, hydro ~19, nuclear 6.7 TWh.
notes: Mix after the April 2023 nuclear phase-out. Lignite and hard coal are modelled separately (lignite is far dirtier) and retired together. Tests which source should absorb retiring coal.
